recipe.title: Garlic mushroom pasta
recipe.description: This creamy mushroom pasta recipe from 5 Ingredients is al dente fusilli tossed in a delicious garlic mushroom sauce. So quick, so easy, so flavour-packed!

steps.descr: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water...
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, peel and finely slice the garlic
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, peel and finely slice the garlic. Place it in a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat with ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, followed 1 minute later by the mushrooms, tearing up any larger ones.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, peel and finely slice the garlic. Place it in a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat with ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, followed 1 minute later by the mushrooms, tearing up any larger ones.

steps.descr: Season with sea salt and black pepper, and cook for 8...
steps.instructions: Season with sea salt and black pepper, and cook for 8 minutes, or until golden, tossing regularly.

on_enter.say: Season with sea salt and black pepper, and cook for 8 minutes, or until golden, tossing regularly.

steps.descr: Toss the drained pasta into the mushroom pan with a...
steps.instructions: Toss the drained pasta into the mushroom pan with a splash of reserved cooking water.

on_enter.say: Toss the drained pasta into the mushroom pan with a splash of reserved cooking water.

steps.descr: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan, stir in the crème...
steps.instructions: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan, stir in the crème fraîche, taste, season to perfection, and dish up, finishing with a final grating of Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan, stir in the crème fraîche, taste, season to perfection, and dish up, finishing with a final grating of Parmesan.
